nodes.name: Webhook - Video Request
nodes.notes: Mottar payload fra trigger-n8n Edge Function. Validerer X-VideoMill-Auth header.

parameters.jsonBody: {"model": "llama3", "prompt": "Analyze trending topics for viral short-form video content. Return 16 topics as JSON array with: {\"title\": string, \"category\": string, \"heat\": string, \"reason\": string, \"tags\": string[], \"rank\": number, \"platform\": string, \"target_audience\": string}. Return ONLY JSON array.", "stream": false}
={{ JSON.stringify($input.all().map(i => ({...i.json, active: true, updated_at: new Date().toISOString()}))) }}

parameters.jsCode: console.log('Analytics:', JSON.stringify($input.first().json)); return $input.all();

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ video_id: $json[0].id, user_id: $json[0].user_id, topic: $json[0].topic || $json[0].title, promp: $json[0].promp || '', voice_id: $json[0].voice_id || 'nb-NO-Pernille', platform: $json[0].platform || 'tiktok', aspect_ratio: $json[0].aspect_ratio || '9:16', language: $json[0].language || 'nb', target_audience: $json[0].target_audience || 'general', action: 'retry' }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const item = items[0].json;
return [{ json: { ...item, agent_role: 'COO', agent_task: 'daily_operations_review' } }];

nodes.name: Marketing Cron (4t)
nodes.notes: Marketing Agent kjører hver 4. time for trendanalyse

parameters.jsCode:
const trends = $input.all().map(i => i.json).filter(t => t.active);
return [{ json: { trends, agent_role: 'Marketing', agent_task: 'trend_analysis' } }];
